series_metadata.series_description: Fiscal reports, monthly reports, pay-ins deposited with Treasurer's Office, monthly reports - all documentation pertains to the receipt of funds.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one year after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain one year after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
